pli-tv-kd9:7.6.0.eng: 10. Discussion of the legal procedure of demotion

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.1.pli: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno, gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi.
pli-tv-kd9:7.6.1.eng: “It may be, monks, that a monk is ignorant, incompetent, often committing offenses, lacking in boundaries, constantly and improperly socializing with householders.

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.3.pli: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu bālo abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno, gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi.
pli-tv-kd9:7.6.3.eng: ‘This monk is ignorant, incompetent, often committing offenses, lacking in boundaries, constantly and improperly socializing with householders.

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.4.eng: Well then, let’s do a legal procedure of demotion against him.’

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.5.eng: They do a procedure of demotion against him—

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.6.eng: illegitimately and with an incomplete assembly.

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.7.pli: So tamhā āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati.
pli-tv-kd9:7.6.7.eng: He then goes to another monastery.

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.9.pli: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena niyassakammakato adhammena vaggehi.
pli-tv-kd9:7.6.9.eng: ‘The Sangha did a legal procedure of demotion against this monk—illegitimately and with an incomplete assembly.

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.10.eng: Well then, let’s do a procedure of demotion against him.’

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.11.eng: They do a procedure of demotion against him—

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.12.eng: illegitimately but with a unanimous assembly. …

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.13.eng: legitimately but with an incomplete assembly. …

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.14.eng: in a legitimate-like way and with an incomplete assembly. …

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.15.eng: in a legitimate-like way but with a unanimous assembly. …”

pli-tv-kd9:7.6.16.eng: The permutation series is to be expanded as above.

pli-tv-kd9:7.7.0.eng: 11. Discussion of the legal procedure of banishment

pli-tv-kd9:7.7.1.pli: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu kuladūsako hoti pāpasamācāro.

pli-tv-kd9:7.7.3.eng: ‘This monk is a corrupter of families and badly behaved.

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.0.eng: 16. Discussion of the lifting of the legal procedure of condemnation

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.1.pli: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saṅghena tajjanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati.
pli-tv-kd9:7.12.1.eng: “It may be, monks, that the Sangha has done a legal procedure of condemnation against a monk, that he then conducts himself properly and suitably so as to deserve to be released, and that he then asks for the lifting of that procedure.
pli-tv-kd9:7.12.1.comm: The meaning of the first of these phrases, sammā vattati, is straightforward, but the last two, lomaṁ pāteti and netthāraṁ vattati, are more difficult. Commenting on Bu Ss 13, Sp 1.435 says: Na lomaṁ pātentīti anulomapaṭipadaṁ appaṭipajjanatāya na pannalomā honti. Na netthāraṁ vattantīti attano nittharaṇamaggaṁ na paṭipajjanti, “Na lomaṁ pātenti: because of their non-practicing in conformity with the path, their bodily hairs are not flat. Na netthāraṁ vattanti: they are not practicing the path for their own getting out (of the offense).” My rendering attempts to capture the meaning in a non-literal way.

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.3.pli: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena tajjanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati.
pli-tv-kd9:7.12.3.eng: ‘The Sangha has done a legal procedure of condemnation against this monk. He has conducted himself properly and suitably so as to deserve to be released, and now asks for the lifting of that procedure.

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.4.eng: Well then, let’s lift that procedure.’

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.6.eng: illegitimately and with an incomplete assembly.

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.7.pli: So tamhā āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati.
pli-tv-kd9:7.12.7.eng: He then goes to another monastery.

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.9.pli: ‘imassa kho, āvuso, bhikkhuno saṅghena tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassaddhaṁ adhammena vaggehi.
pli-tv-kd9:7.12.9.eng: ‘The Sangha has lifted a legal procedure of condemnation against this monk—illegitimately and with an incomplete assembly.

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.10.eng: Well then, let’s lift that procedure.’

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.12.eng: illegitimately but with a unanimous assembly.

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.13.pli: So tamhāpi āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati.
pli-tv-kd9:7.12.13.eng: He then goes to yet another monastery.

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.49.0.eng: 20. Discussion of the lifting of the legal procedure of ejection for not recognizing

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.49.1.pli: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saṅghena āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati.
pli-tv-kd9:7.14.49.1.eng: “It may be that the Sangha has done a legal procedure of ejection against a monk for not recognizing an offense, that he then conducts himself properly and suitably so as to deserve to be released, and that he then asks for the lifting of that procedure.

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.51.pli: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati.
pli-tv-kd9:7.14.51.eng: ‘The Sangha has done a legal procedure of ejection against this monk for not recognizing an offense. He has conducted himself properly and suitably so as to deserve to be released, and now asks for the lifting of that procedure.

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.52.pli: Handassa mayaṁ āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhemā’ti.
pli-tv-kd9:7.14.52.eng: Well then, let’s lift that procedure.’

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.53.pli: Te tassa āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhenti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.54.eng: illegitimately and with an incomplete assembly.

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.65.0.eng: 21. Discussion of the lifting of the legal procedure of ejection for not making amends

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.82.0.eng: 22. Discussion of the lifting of the legal procedure of ejection for not giving up a bad view

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.82.1.pli: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saṅghena pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati.
pli-tv-kd9:7.14.82.1.eng: “It may be that the Sangha has done a legal procedure of ejection against a monk for not giving up a bad view, that he then conducts himself properly and suitably so as to deserve to be released, and that he then asks for the lifting of that procedure.

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.84.pli: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati.
pli-tv-kd9:7.14.84.eng: ‘The Sangha has done a legal procedure of ejection against this monk for not giving up a bad view. He has conducted himself properly and suitably so as to deserve to be released, and now asks for the lifting of that procedure.

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.85.pli: Handassa mayaṁ pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhemā’ti.
pli-tv-kd9:7.14.85.eng: Well then, let’s lift that procedure.’

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.86.pli: Te tassa pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhenti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.87.eng: illegitimately and with an incomplete assembly.

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.88.pli: So tamhā āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati.
pli-tv-kd9:7.14.88.eng: He then goes to another monastery.

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.90.pli: ‘imassa kho, āvuso, bhikkhuno saṅghena pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassaddhaṁ—
pli-tv-kd9:7.14.90.eng: ‘The Sangha has lifted a legal procedure of ejection against this monk for not giving up a bad view—

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.91.eng: illegitimately and with an incomplete assembly.

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.92.pli: Handassa mayaṁ pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhemā’ti.
pli-tv-kd9:7.14.92.eng: Well then, let’s lift that procedure.’

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.93.pli: Te tassa pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhenti …

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.94.eng: illegitimately but with a unanimous assembly. …

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.95.eng: legitimately but with an incomplete assembly. …

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.96.eng: in a legitimate-like way and with an incomplete assembly. …

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.97.eng: in a legitimate-like way but with a unanimous assembly. …”

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.98.eng: The permutation series is to be expanded.

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.0.eng: 23. Discussion of disputes on the legal procedure of condemnation

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.1.pli: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako.
pli-tv-kd9:7.15.1.eng: “It may be, monks, that a monk is quarrelsome and argumentative, one who creates legal issues in the Sangha.

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.4.eng: one who creates legal issues in the Sangha.

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.5.eng: Well then, let’s do a legal procedure of condemnation against him.’

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.7.eng: illegitimately and with an incomplete assembly.

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.9.pli: ‘adhammena vaggakammaṁ, adhammena samaggakammaṁ, dhammena vaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ, akataṁ kammaṁ dukkaṭaṁ kammaṁ puna kātabbaṁ kamman’ti.
pli-tv-kd9:7.15.9.eng: ‘It was an illegitimate procedure done with an incomplete assembly,’ ‘It was an illegitimate procedure done with a unanimous assembly,’ ‘It was a legitimate procedure done with an incomplete assembly,’ ‘It was a legitimate-like procedure done with an incomplete assembly,’ ‘It was a legitimate-like procedure done with a unanimous assembly,’ ‘The procedure is invalid, it was badly done, and it needs to be done again.’

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.11.pli: ‘adhammena vaggakamman’ti, ye ca te bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—
pli-tv-kd9:7.15.11.eng: ‘It was an illegitimate legal procedure done with an incomplete assembly,’ and those who say,

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.12.pli: ‘akataṁ kammaṁ dukkaṭaṁ kammaṁ puna kātabbaṁ kamman’ti, ime tattha bhikkhū dhammavādino.
pli-tv-kd9:7.15.12.eng: ‘The legal procedure is invalid, it was badly done, and it needs to be done again,’ they are the ones there who speak in accordance with the Teaching.

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.0.eng: 24. Discussion of disputes on the legal procedure of demotion

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.1.pli: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno, gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi.
pli-tv-kd9:7.17.1.eng: “It may be, monks, that a monk is ignorant, incompetent, often committing offenses, lacking in boundaries, constantly and improperly socializing with householders.

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.3.pli: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu bālo abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno, gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi.
